creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Remove SeaBUG, it's been down for at least 5 months
	- Re-add VicFUG, it's come back
	- Revert the change I submitted (rev. 1.63) to change the GTABUG
	  URL from gtabug.ca to gtabug.com - gtabug.ca is back, and is more
	  up-to-date than the .com.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
